# kUSBPowerRequestSleepRelease

**Enumeration Case**

The system requests a release of power upon sleeping.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBPowerRequestSleepRelease = 3
```

## Discussion

When you use this enumeration with [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/iokit/iousbdeviceinterface942/2977171-returnextrapower], it sends a message to all devices to return any sleep power, if possible.
title: kUSBPowerRequestSleepRelease
